description:
You are a layout artist polishing a camera move. The current scene has a 'Dolly_Move' animation on the camera. Layer the 'Handheld_Shake' action on top of the dolly move using the Non-Linear Animation (NLA) system, ensuring the shake effect is added to the original movement without overwriting its keyframes. Save the final scene to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/nla_camera_composite.blend.

Login: The desktop session is already active. Blender is open with the scene loaded.
